politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Apple’s Privacy Policy describes how Apple collects, uses, and shares your personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Apple or an Apple-affiliated company (collectively, “Apple”)

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If you have questions about Apple’s Privacy Policy or privacy practices including where a third-party service provider is acting on our behalf, or you would like to contact our Data Protection Officer, you can contact us at apple.com/legal/privacy/contact

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
- **Account Information.**Your Apple Account and related account details, including email address, devices registered, account status, and age
- **Device Information.**Data from which your device could be identified, such as device serial number, or about your device, such as browser type
- **Contact Information**. Data such as name, email address, physical address, phone number, or other contact information
- **Payment Information. Data about your billing address and method of payment, such as bank details, credit, debit, or other payment card information**

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Apple uses your personal data only when we have a valid legal basis to do so.**Depending on the circumstance, Apple may rely on your consent or the fact that the processing is necessary to fulfill a contract with you, protect your vital interests or those of other persons, or to comply with law.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You are not required to provide the personal data that we have requested. However, if you choose not to do so, in many cases we will not be able to provide you with our products or services or respond to requests you may have.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Apple retains personal data only for so long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, including as described in this Privacy Policy or in our service-specific privacy notices, or as required by law.**

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Apple may share personal data with **Apple-affiliated companies**,**service providers**who act on our behalf, our**partners**,**developers, and publishers**, or others**at your direction**.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Prise de décision automatisée
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Apple does not use algorithms or profiling to make any decision that would significantly affect you without the opportunity for human review.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We use **administrative, technical, and physical safeguards** to protect your personal data, taking into account the nature of the personal data and the processing, and the threats posed.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Apple may receive personal data about you from other **individuals**, from businesses or third parties acting**at your direction**, from our**partners**who work with us to provide our products and services and assist us in security and fraud prevention, and from other

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
- **Individuals.**Apple may collect data about you from other individuals — for example, if that individual has sent you a product or gift card, invited you to participate in an Apple service or forum, or shared content with you.
- **At Your Direction.**You may direct other individuals or third parties to share data with Apple.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the applicable regulator.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: At Apple, we respect your ability to know, access, correct, transfer, restrict the processing of, and delete your personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: At Apple, we respect your ability to know, access, correct, transfer, restrict the processing of, and delete your personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: At Apple, we respect your ability to know, access, correct, transfer, restrict the processing of, and delete your personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: At Apple, we respect your ability to know, access, correct, transfer, restrict the processing of, and delete your personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: At Apple, we respect your ability to know, access, correct, transfer, restrict the processing of, and delete your personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: if you choose to exercise these privacy rights, you have the right not to be treated in a discriminatory way nor to receive a lesser degree of service from Apple.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: ### Updated July 30, 2025

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: ## Cookies and Other TechnologiesApple’s websites, online services, interactive applications, and advertisements may use “cookies” and other technologies such as web beacons.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: **These technologies help us to better understand user behavior including for security and fraud prevention purposes, tell us which parts of our websites people have visited, and facilitate and measure the effectiveness of advertisements and web searches.**

cookies.label: Détail des finalités (2e niveau)
cookies.quote:
- **Communications Cookies.**These cookies are used to enable network traffic to and from Apple’s systems, including by helping us detect any errors.
- **Strictly Necessary Cookies.**These cookies are set as required to provide a specific feature or service that you have accessed or requested.
- **Other Cookies.**These cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with our websites and online services, including by helping us to assess the effectiveness of advertisements and web searches.

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
Outil de mesure d'audience mentionné
cookies.quote: Apple also uses these cookies to remember choices you make while browsing, so we can provide you with a customized experience.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: **your personal data may be transferred to or accessed by entities around the world,**including Apple-affiliated companies, to perform processing activities such as those described in this Privacy Policy in connection with your use of our products and services.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs
transferts_hors_ue.quote: Personal data collected by Apple or an Apple-affiliated company worldwide is generally stored by Apple Inc. in the United States.
